name: c3_reading_vs_afk
description: C3 — reading a paper (low keyboard input, frequent scroll => idle stays well below threshold) is captured as an ACTIVE reading session, not dropped and not idle. Only when the user truly walks away (idle >= threshold) does an IDLE_START fire and the session end at the moment input actually stopped.
